409 level is the confluence of several fib levels I’m charging.

comment.body: Rolling is essentially just closing your options and opening a new one. Typically if I’m expecting a pullback - i would just close it and reenter once I have better confidence. The other option I do if I hold leaps is just add short hedges on high iv and close the hedges on pullback.

comment.body:
Thanks - I like those ideas for playing ups
And downs of IV. 

But I think we’re saying the same thing, just maybe we have different expectancies about the direction of the move after this bounce

I am expecting price to pull back if we hit 410, but think after initial profit taking on the move in the first 20-30 mins, we could see upward
Momentum continue. 

Which is why I’d sell the deep ITM 390s which would have a higher IV than the ATM and
OTM, and as price pulls back and IV across all strikes declines I would buy an ATM 410
Call with some of profits (rolling to the higher strike and likely rolling out to a farther expiration as well)
